name: @pbkware/fielded-text-web
description: A library implementing the Fielded Text format in TypeScript.

scripts.types: npm run declaration && npm run rollup
scripts.api: npm run build && npm run rollup
scripts.clean: npx del-cli ./dist && npx del-cli ./declaration && npx del-cli ./docs
scripts.dist: npm run clean && npm run api
scripts.compliance:baseline: npm run test:compliance:json || true; npm run report:compliance
scripts.docs:check:drift: (command -v rg >/dev/null && rg -n "fieldList\[" README.md docs/guide examples --glob "*.md" || grep -R -n -E "fieldList\[" README.md docs/guide examples --include='*.md') && echo "ERROR: found deprecated fieldList[index] docs pattern" && exit 1 || true
scripts.docs:check:nullability: (command -v rg >/dev/null && rg -n "nullableValue.*undefined|asNullable.*undefined|nullable value accessors return.*undefined" README.md docs/guide examples --glob "*.md" || grep -R -n -E "nullableValue.*undefined|asNullable.*undefined|nullable value accessors return.*undefined" README.md docs/guide examples --include='*.md') && echo "ERROR: found undefined nullable-value docs pattern" && exit 1 || true
scripts.docs:align: npm run build && npm test && npm run examples:all && npm run docs && npm run api && npm run docs:check:drift && npm run docs:check:nullability
